## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Make agents converse visibly and continuously in Slack.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S10): Turn Slack from notification-only into an operational control interface: mirrored messages, local transcript, reply reading, approvals, signed slash commands, and visible continuous agent conversation.
